action.reasoning: Observation: predict.py works locally — IC=0.0435, RankIC=0.0347, days=484. Pipeline is solid. Analysis: Need to submit eval to confirm, then try to improve. Current LightGBM model only ran ~24 iters; could likely benefit from longer training, better params, or ensembling. Decision: First submit eval with current model to confirm score and measure eval iteration time.
